**输出：** [3,0,0,3,3]

  - 最长的相邻对是 `["run", "run"]`，其公共前缀为 `"run"`（长度为 3）

**示例 2：**

**输入：** words = ["dog","racer","car"]

**输出：** [0,0,0]

**解释：**

- 移除任意下标都会导致答案为 0。

- `1 <= words.length <= 105`
- `1 <= words[i].length <= 104`

fn solve(words: Vec<String>) -> Vec<i64> {
    let n = words.len();
    if n == 1 {
        return vec![0];
    }
    let m = n - 1;
    let mut prefixes = vec![0; m];
    for j in 0..m {
        let s1 = &words[j];
        let s2 = &words[j + 1];
        let mut len = 0;
        while len < s1.len() && len < s2.len() && s1.as_bytes()[len] == s2.as_bytes()[len] {
            len += 1;
        }
        prefixes[j] = len;
    }
    // compute prefix_max
    let mut prefix_max = vec![0; m];
    let mut current_max = 0;
    for j in 0..m {
        current_max = std::cmp::max(current_max, prefixes[j]);
        prefix_max[j] = current_max;
    }
    // compute suffix_max
    let mut suffix_max = vec![0; m];
    let mut current_max = 0;
    for j in (0..m).rev() {
        current_max = std::cmp::max(current_max, prefixes[j]);
        suffix_max[j] = current_max;
    }
    let mut answer = vec![0; n];
    for i in 0..n {
        if (n - 1) < 2 {
            answer[i] = 0;
            continue;
        }
        let mut max_remaining = 0;
        if i == 0 {
            // exclude prefix[0], so max is suffix_max[1]
            if m >= 2 {
                max_remaining = suffix_max[1];
            } else {
                max_remaining = 0;
            }
        } else if i == n - 1 {
            // exclude prefix[m-1], which is prefix[m-1] = prefixes[n-2]
            if m >= 2 {
                max_remaining = prefix_max[m - 2];
            } else {
                max_remaining = 0;
            }
        } else {
            let left = if i - 2 >= 0 { prefix_max[i - 2] } else { 0 };
            let right = if i + 1 < m { suffix_max[i + 1] } else { 0 };
            max_remaining = left.max(right);
        }
        let new_pair = 0;
        if i > 0 && i < n - 1 {
            let s1 = &words[i - 1];
            let s2 = &words[i + 1];
            let mut len = 0;
            while len < s1.len() && len < s2.len() && s1.as_bytes()[len] == s2.as_bytes()[len] {
                len += 1;
            }
            new_pair = len;
        }
        answer[i] = max_remaining.max(new_pair) as i64;
    }

fn common_prefix(s: &str, t: &str) -> usize {
    let min_len = std::cmp::min(s.len(), t.len());
    for i in 0..min_len {
        if s.as_bytes()[i] != t.as_bytes()[i] {
            return i;
        }
    }
    min_len
}
